name: Tomato Basil Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Finely chopped sun-dried tomatoes in oil, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade, combine milk, cheeses, and garlic powder.
2. Process until smooth.
3. By hand, stir in tomatoes and basil.
4. Spoon into serving bowl.
5. Serve with crackers.
6. Store in refrigerator.
